title: Brazilian Iron Ore: Watching the Grass Grow…
section_path: Brazilian Iron Ore: Watching the Grass Grow…
section_path_text: Brazilian Iron Ore: Watching the Grass Grow…
summary:
Main
2020 was a disastrous year for the world, to say the least. With the pandemic wreaking havoc in societies and economies, the world was battling so many fronts at the same time and even today with the potential massive vaccinations about to begin, the future remains highly uncertain. For dry bulk shipping however, it was a decent year despite all the obstacles, as China once again proved a safe harbor for dry bulk demand.
